title: Secure LiveView against <.link navigate=> bypass
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/admin_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.AdminLive). Mount-level auth must be done in on_mount (not just in the router plug chain) — because <.link navigate={...}> bypasses the plug chain. Use on_mount {MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :ensure_admin} at the top of the module. mount/3 additionally double-checks socket.assigns.current_user.role == :admin and halts with {:ok, redirect(socket, to: ~p"/")} otherwise. Plus a per-event check in handle_event("promote") that re-validates admin role.
tier_rationale: Requires understanding that live-navigation bypasses plugs. Must apply auth in both places.
research_citation: Phoenix LiveView security considerations: 'live_redirects don\'t go through the plug pipeline'
